code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut cur = 0
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  while i <= n
    mut b = -1
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = -1
      end
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    if is_digit
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else if is_minus and not have
      neg = true
    else
      if have
        mut v = cur
        if neg
          v = -v
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        cur = 0
        have = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for x in xs
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
mut result: List<Int> = []
for x in a
  if list.contains(b, x)
    result = insert_sorted_unique(result, x)
  end
end
if list.len(result) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in result
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
